compute.cost_note: network-bound; search cursor pagination plus one detail fetch per document; per-doc-type word floors (brief 3000, affidavit 1000)

do_not_use_when: the source is not the CourtListener v4 API

inputs.target: CourtListener v4 REST API (Token header auth)

purpose: acquire legal briefs (--doc-type brief -> legal_brief) or expert affidavits/declarations (--doc-type affidavit -> expert_affidavit) from CourtListener / RECAP into the impostor pool (the population baselines argmove_profile profiles).
use_when: building the legal_brief population baseline from public-record RECAP briefs
building the expert_affidavit population baseline from public-record RECAP declarations (--doc-type affidavit applies the structural + OCR screens)
